data.title: Bitcoin hit its new ATH without fresh supply, forcing buyers to chase dormant coins
data.description:
Bitcoin didn’t reach its new ATH with widespread coin movement or a surge in recycled supply. The rally came as large portions of Bitcoin’s UTXO set continued to age, locking up liquidity instead of distributing it. Between Feb
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-hit-its-new-ath-without-fresh-supply-forcing-buyers-to-chase-dormant-coins/

data.title: SEC dismisses lawsuit against Binance
data.description:
The SEC and Binance have signed a joint stipulation to end the two-year legal battle, court documents show.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-dismisses-lawsuit-against-binance-filings-show?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump administration to cut thousands of jobs at the State Dept
data.description:
On Thursday, the Trump administration formally alerted Congress to a major shake-up of the State Department that would cut thousands of jobs, trim or merge hundreds of offices, and shift the agency’s human rights bureau toward President Donald Trump’s “America First” agenda. The overhaul forms part of Trump’s effort to shrink the federal bureaucracy and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-cut-thousands-of-jobs-state-dept/

data.title: SEC moves to dismiss Binance litigation as agency looks to forge new regulatory path for crypto
data.description:
The SEC is seeking to dismiss its lawsuit against crypto giant Binance, according to a court document filed on Thursday.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356298/sec-moves-to-dismiss-binance-litigation-as-agency-looks-to-forge-new-regulatory-path-for-crypto?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC Agrees to Drop Lawsuit Against Binance and Founder CZ: Court Filing
data.description:
The SEC is pulling out of yet another crypto case, filing to dismiss its ongoing litigation against Binance and founder Changpeng Zhao.
source: https://decrypt.co/322848/sec-agrees-drop-lawsuit-binance-cz

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC USD) Continues To Attract Institutional Liquidity
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC USD) demand notably slowed down in the last week of May, signaling a cooling down of the momentum observed in the previous week. But despite that, recent data revealed that demand from the large holder cohort remained strong. A recent CryptoQuant analysis revealed that large holder activity was experiencing positive growth
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/29/bitcoin-btc-usd-continues-to-attract-institutional-liquidity/

data.title: LIBRA Token Fallout: Court Blocks $57.65M in USDC Linked to Kelsier Ventures
data.description:
Circle froze two Solana wallets holding USDC linked to Kelsier Ventures, which happens to be the team behind LIBRA's controversial launch.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/libra-token-fallout-court-blocks-57-65m-in-usdc-linked-to-kelsier-ventures/

data.title: Crypto conglomerate DCG finds majority of Americans sympathetic to decentralized AI, Harris poll shows
data.description:
Many Americans remain skeptical of Big Tech firms on issues related to data sovereignty and information bias, a DCG funded survey found.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356294/crypto-conglomerate-dcg-finds-majority-of-americans-sympathetic-to-decentralized-ai-harris-poll-shows?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SOL Strategies Ditches Bitcoin Holdings for Solana: Company Now Owns 420,355 SOL
data.description:
(CSE: HODL) announced an additional purchase of Solana (SOL) coins to strengthen its balance sheet. The Canadian company announced on Thursday that it acquired an additional 26,478 SOL coins for $4. 7 million at an average price of about $177
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/sol-strategies-ditches-bitcoin-holdings-for-solana-company-now-owns-420355-sol/

data.title: BlockDAG Banks $10M in 7 Days While Hedera (HBAR) Charts Turn Bearish & Ethereum (ETH) Stalls at $2,550
data.description:
Investors aren’t chasing technical setups anymore, they’re chasing real results. Hedera (HBAR) bearish momentum shows how fast sentiment flips when price hits resistance. Meanwhile, Ethereum (ETH) price pattern stays stuck, with bullish ETF inflows clashing against strong short interest. ETH trades sideways near $2,550, still caught between bulls and bears
source: https://crypto-economy.com/blockdag-banks-10m-in-7-days-while-hedera-hbar-charts-turn-bearish-ethereum-eth-stalls-at-2550/

data.title: Webus International reveals $300M XRP treasury bid to power borderless payments
data.description:
Webus International revealed a plan on May 29 to raise up to $300 million through non-equity financing and deploy the capital into an XRP reserve that will support the company’s global chauffeur services payments network.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/webus-international-reveals-300m-xrp-treasury-bid-to-power-borderless-payments/

data.title: Bitcoin Powers to $112K, But On-Chain Metrics Warn of Potential Pause: CryptoQuant
data.description:
Bitcoin has broken an all-time high at $112,000, bolstering bulls, but on-chain readings from CryptoQuant have pointed to a potential cooling period. The Bull Score Index stands at 80, yet slowing whale inflows and rising unrealized profit margins have flagged consolidation risks near $120K.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-powers-to-112k-but-on-chain-metrics-warn-of-potential-pause-cryptoquant/

data.title: Someone loses over $500,000 in deUSD liquidation, raising concerns about Chainlink’s VWAP pricing system
data.description:
Some onlookers think this decentralized market function could be improved either through stablecoin price caps or "more resilient" algorithms.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/356288/someone-loses-over-500000-in-deusd-liquidation-raising-concerns-about-chainlinks-vwap-pricing-system?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: GameStop Buys 4,710 Bitcoin in First Crypto Move
data.description:
Video game company GameStop has confirmed its entrance into the Bitcoin market, purchasing around 4,710 Bitcoins. While it did not disclose details on the acquisition’s cost, the batch purchase is estimated to have cost $513 million. GameStop disclosed the purchase in a recent Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/gamestop-buys-4710-bitcoin-in-first-crypto-move/

data.title: Tether, Tron, B2B transactions dominate stablecoin markets, but Circle is on the come up
data.description:
New findings from Artemis Analytics showed that Tether’s USDT and Tron blockchain led the charge in global stablecoin transactions, especially in the B2B sector. Circle’s USDC is also gaining momentum and positioning itself for a larger market share. The report published by the blockchain data analytics platform revealed that stablecoins have solidified their position as essential […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-tron-b2b-dominate-stablecoin-markets/
